what_worked: convert_to_one_time_event can neutralise repeated exploitation of a sparse event bonus.
recommend_next: When repeated event exploitation is flagged on an event_bonus, consider making the reward one‑time as a first response.
agent_lessons.applicability_notes: This lesson applies to event‑based rewards that are triggered more than once per episode due to the agent gaming the condition (e.g., bouncing).

summary: r_contact event_bonus is exploited via bouncing, causing repeated large rewards. Convert to one-time event to mitigate exploitation.
